aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with some structured content and service information but lacks depth in content, user engagement, and review signals.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve trust signals.
Expand on service pages with more detailed content and target long-tail keywords.
Optimize metadata and headers with location-specific keywords to improve local search visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes basic business information but lacks structured GBP (Google Business Profile) optimization.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business does not have a visible Google Business Profile, which is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Missing location-specific content and service details.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement metrics.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on the website but lacks citations on external platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and social media profiles.
Monitor and update citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of content depth and user engagement signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for detailed HVAC services and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding customer testimonials and detailed service descriptions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as a local expert by publishing HVAC guides and tips.
